message:
fix(io): harden edge cases in browser stream, file tests, and seek casts

Three targeted I/O correctness fixes:

- browser_stream.rs: add early-return guards for zero-length operations —
  poll_read returns Ok(()) when buf.remaining()==0, poll_write returns Ok(0)
  for empty buffers, and explicit WriteLimitExceeded error when
  allow_partial_writes is false and the full buffer exceeds budget (instead
  of silent truncation)
- fs/file.rs: add .truncate(true) to test OpenOptions chain alongside
  .create(true).write(true).read(true), required on newer Rust editions
  where create without truncate is a warning
- io/ext/seek_ext.rs: replace two lossy "offset as u64" casts with
  offset.unsigned_abs() in the test AsyncSeek impl for SeekFrom::End and
  SeekFrom::Current positive-offset cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
